creator: casper@acc.am
text:
HELLo Georg,

Friday, December 03, 1999, 12:42:14 AM, you wrote:

>>Number:         15229
>>Category:       bin
>>Synopsis:       mtree - different from mtree in NetBSD 1.4
>>Confidential:   no
>>Severity:       non-critical
>>Priority:       low
>>Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
>>State:          open
>>Quarter:        
>>Keywords:       
>>Date-Required:
>>Class:          change-request
>>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>>Arrival-Date:   Thu Dec  2 12:50:01 PST 1999
>>Closed-Date:
>>Last-Modified:
>>Originator:     Georg Wagner
>>Release:        FreeBSD 2.2.8-STABLE i386/ all releases
>>Organization:
GW> -
>>Environment:


>>Description:
GW>          In NetBSD the functionality of mtree was changed to recognise and
GW>          set/unset the file flags (schg, sappnd). This functionality is
GW>          extremely usefull in environments with high security risks.

GW>          Original proposal of A. Wennmacher:
--skipped--

GW> The flags specifications should be included in /etc/mtree/NetBSD.dist.
GW> To make it short, here is my suggestion how to set schg and sappnd on
GW> the NetBSD system files:

GW> /etc                            sappnd
            in this case mk_pwddb won't work , 'cause it creates
            temporary files in /etc directory , right ?
--skip--
GW> /var                            sappnd
GW> /var/account                    sappnd
GW>         /var/account/*          sappnd
    i think the /var/log notice alos applicable here .
--skip--
GW> /var/log                        sappnd
GW>         /var/log/*              none
GW>         /var/log/authlog        sappnd  (1)
GW>         /var/log/lastlog        sappnd
GW>         /var/log/wtmp           sappnd  (1)
    but will this (sappnd flag on /var/log directory)
    allow log rotation by newsyslog ?
--skipp--
GW> /var/run                        sappnd

GW> (1): Syslog framework will have to be changed
GW> (2): root, don't play games!
GW> (3): currently not applicable
GW> (4): whatis.db should be moved to /var/man

GW> --
GW> Dr. Alexandre Wennmacher
GW> Institut fuer Geophysik und Meteorologie         wennmach@geo.Uni-Koeln.DE
GW> Universitaet zu Koeln                            phone  +49 221 470 - 3387
GW> D-50923 Koeln                                    fax    +49 221 470 - 5198        

GW>         Take the mtree out of NetBSD 1.4 and port it to FreeBSD. Only minor
GW>         changes are neccessary.


            Casper                            mailto:casper@acc.am
